packageRules.description: minimumReleaseAge cannot be enforced for these update types (the package manager performs the resolution); without this they would be filtered as permanently pending and never raised as PRs

Pin conventional-changelog-conventionalcommits to v9. @semantic-release/release-notes-generator only devDepends on it, so we must provide it as a direct dependency, and it must match the release notes generator's template engine (conventional-changelog-writer@8 / Handlebars). v10 ships templates for writer@9, which renders empty release notes. Revisit once release-notes-generator upgrades to writer@9.
